name: TerminalSkills Skills Library
description: Open-source library of AI agent skills — SKILL.md files for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor. A collection of 19 ready-to-use skill definitions covering automation, coding, research, and productivity workflows.
review: Library of 19 SKILL.md files for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and Cursor. Well-documented with clear structure. Security scan clean — all SKILL.md content, no executable code. Apache-2.0 licensed. Conditionally approved at 6.9/10; some skills may overlap with existing catalog entries.

drax_results.note: Manual review route — Gamora reviewed directly
